name: scene_nodes_capsule_synthesis_smoke
description: End-to-end test of the create_capsule_with_pattern tool — the 'I GOT YOU EASY' artist-facing capsule synthesizer. Creates fresh SN Generator/Deformer objects, populates their embedded graphs with named patterns, validates the result via classify_graph + walk. Locks the canonical capsule-first authoring path.

args.script:
import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['Loop Over Indices', 'Memory Capsule State Carrier', 'Procedural Surface Scatter']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('setup ok — cleared any prior synthesized capsules')

import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['Loop Over Indices', 'Memory Capsule State Carrier', 'Procedural Surface Scatter']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('teardown ok')
